title: Large Language Model--Driven Building Energy Model Generation
abstract: Building energy modeling (BEM) is essential for sustainable design, but traditionally relies on manual processes, which are time-consuming and error-prone. Large language models (LLMs) offer potential for automating model generation from natural language descriptions. This study aims to develop an LLM-driven approach to generate simulation-ready EnergyPlus IDF files from free-form text, improving efficiency and accuracy in building energy simulations. We fine-tune Gemma-3-4B-IT on a dataset of paired natural-language descriptions and IDF models for single-, two-, and three-zone rectilinear buildings. The post-training pipeline has two stages: first, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on a 2,100-sample dataset to align the schema and text--IDF mapping; second, group relative preference optimization (GRPO) on an additional 300-sample dataset to improve geometric accuracy and constraint adherence further, using low-rank adaptation (LoRA) for parameter-efficient tuning. On a 300-sample test set, Stage-1 SFT achieved 98.33% parse-pass rate and 96.00% boundary consistency but only 31.00% window geometry agreement and 24.67% end-to-end validity. Stage-2 GRPO improved these to 85.00% window agreement and 78.00% end-to-end validity.
pdfFile: Liu et al. - 2026 - Large language model–driven building energy model generation
markdownFile: Liu et al. - 2026 - Large language model–driven building energy model generation
task: 自然语言驱动的建筑能耗模型自动生成
taskEn: Natural language-driven automated building energy model generation
inputData: 自然语言建筑描述文本
contribution: 提出两阶段后训练方法（SFT+GRPO）微调Gemma-3-4B-IT，实现从自由文本自动生成可仿真的EnergyPlus IDF文件，端到端有效率达78%，减少建筑能耗建模中的专家干预。
methodology: 两阶段后训练流程：第一阶段对2100样本数据集进行监督微调（SFT），对齐文本- IDF模式映射；第二阶段对300样本数据集进行组相对偏好优化（GRPO），提升几何精度与约束满足。采用LoRA进行参数高效微调。数据集覆盖单区、双区和三区矩形建筑。
results: 第一阶段SFT：解析通过率98.33%，边界一致性96.00%，但窗口几何一致率仅31.00%，端到端有效率24.67%。第二阶段GRPO：窗口几何一致率提升至85.00%，端到端有效率提升至78.00%，解析通过率97.67%。显著优于ChatGPT 5.2、Gemini 3 Pro和DeepSeek-V3.2等通用大模型。
